<style>
@media (min-width: 768px){
  .lc-full-bleed{width:100vw;margin-left:calc(-50vw + 50%);max-width:none;}
  .lc-content-max{max-width:1600px;margin-left:auto;margin-right:auto;padding-left:2rem;padding-right:2rem;}
  #categories{max-width:1600px !important;}
  .lc-story{max-width:1600px !important;}
  .lc-sbanners{max-width:1600px !important;}
  .hv-inner{max-width:1600px !important;}
  .lc-why{max-width:1600px !important;}
  [id*="featured_collection2"] .page-width{max-width:1600px !important;}
  /* featured_sale full-width */
  [id*="featured_sale"] .page-width{max-width:100% !important;padding-left:2rem !important;padding-right:2rem !important;}
  [id*="featured_sale"] .slider{padding-left:0 !important;}
}
@media (max-width: 767px){ .lc-content-max{padding-left:1rem;padding-right:1rem;} }
/* FIX 1 — tighter, standardized vertical section padding */
section, .lc-hero, .lc-sbanners, #categories, .lc-trust-premium, .hv-wrap, .lc-story, .lc-why-wrap, [id*="featured_sale"], [id*="featured_collection2"]{
  padding-top:1.5rem !important;
  padding-bottom:1.5rem !important;
}
/* FIX 2 — header->hero flush. The broad `section` rule above adds padding-top to the hero's <section class="shopify-section section"> WRAPPER (sits between sticky header and .lc-hero); the old fix only zeroed the inner .lc-hero. Zero the wrapper too. */
.section-header{margin-bottom:0 !important;}
[id$="lc_design_system"]{display:none !important;}
.shopify-section:has(.lc-hero){padding-top:0 !important;}
.lc-hero{padding-top:0 !important;}
/* FIX 3 — trustbar text larger */
.lc-trust-item strong{font-size:1.25rem !important;}
.lc-trust-item span{font-size:1rem !important;}

/* FIX 4 (mobile rhythm) — condense vertical spacing on phones (was flat 1.5rem everywhere) */
@media (max-width: 767px){
  section, .lc-sbanners, #categories, .lc-trust-premium, .hv-wrap, .lc-story, .lc-why-wrap, [id*="featured_sale"], [id*="featured_collection2"]{
    padding-top:0.85rem !important;
    padding-bottom:0.85rem !important;
  }
  /* keep the header->hero flush intact, only trim hero bottom */
  .shopify-section:has(.lc-hero){padding-top:0 !important;}
  .lc-hero{padding-top:0 !important; padding-bottom:0.85rem !important;}
  /* tighten the inter-section gap (homepage-scoped equivalent of a lower --spacing-sections-mobile) */
  .section + .section{margin-top:12px !important;}
}
</style>
